# Accordion

Accordion is used to show and hide content in collapsible sections.

## Default

<Preview name="accordion-default" />

## Arrow icon

<Preview name="accordion-arrow" />

## Plus icon

<Preview name="accordion-plus" />

## Joined

<Preview name="accordion-joined" />

---

## Props

### Accordion

<PropsTable
  data={[
    {
      name: "name",
      type: "string",
      description:
        "Name attribute for all items to group them (allowing only one to be open at a time). Auto-generated if omitted.",
    },
    {
      name: "joined",
      type: "boolean",
      description:
        "Applies 'join' styling to make the accordion items sit flush together.",
    },
  ]}
/>

### Accordion.Item

<PropsTable
  data={[
    {
      name: "icon",
      type: "'none' | 'arrow' | 'plus'",
      default: "'none'",
      description: "Determines the icon variant to display on the trigger.",
    },
    {
      name: "joined",
      type: "boolean",
      description:
        "Applies joined styles to the individual item. Usually set to true if the parent Accordion is joined.",
    },
    {
      name: "defaultOpen",
      type: "boolean",
      description: "Opens the accordion item by default on initial render.",
    },
  ]}
/>
